behavior_shifts.behavior_shift: People are evaluating and comparing 真零 有机酸奶 for purchase on social commerce platforms
behavior_shifts.evidence: Increase in L3 purchase-intent activity on 什么值得买 with 4 related discussions
behavior_shifts.why_early: Not yet present in L5/L6 media, still confined to early adopters

behavior_shifts.behavior_shift: People are evaluating and comparing 酷态科 for purchase on social commerce platforms
behavior_shifts.evidence: Increase in L3 purchase-intent activity on 什么值得买 with 3 related discussions (百亿补贴：酷态科 65W 2C1A 氮化镓充电器 AD653C · 88VIP：奥睿科 GN30 30W氮化镓充电器+1米双C线)
behavior_shifts.why_early: Not yet present in L5/L6 media, still confined to early adopters

behavior_shifts.behavior_shift: People are evaluating and comparing 1号会员店 精选进口原切牛肋条肉 for purchase on social commerce platforms
behavior_shifts.evidence: Increase in L3 purchase-intent activity on 什么值得买 with 3 related discussions (今日必买：1号会员店 精选进口原切牛肋条肉1kg · 今日必买：1号会员店 精选整根和牛 牛腱子1kg)
behavior_shifts.why_early: Not yet present in L5/L6 media, still confined to early adopters
